primarySources.name: Bitcoin Core validation
primarySources.boundChoice: Bitcode validates fixed supply and ledger finality rather than trusting UI/indexer assertions.

primarySources.name: BIP 174 PSBT
primarySources.boundChoice: BTC fee payments use a PSBT-style user signing lifecycle without server custody.

primarySources.name: BIP 341 Taproot
primarySources.boundChoice: Bitcoin AssetPack anchor receipts select Taproot as the preferred Bitcoin commitment posture.

primarySources.name: Filecoin minting model
primarySources.boundChoice: Bitcode measureminting decays against admitted measured knowledge rather than time.

primarySources.name: ERC-721
primarySources.boundChoice: Ethereum uniqueness standards are references only; $BTD remains a Bitcode source-share cell/range registry.

primarySources.name: ERC-2309
primarySources.boundChoice: Consecutive-transfer semantics inform AssetPack range events.

primarySources.name: ERC-4907
primarySources.boundChoice: Owner/user separation informs owner-read versus licensed-read posture.

primarySources.name: EIP-712
primarySources.boundChoice: Signed intents require Bitcode-level nonce, deadline, and domain separation.

primarySources.name: OpenZeppelin Contracts
primarySources.boundChoice: Candidate Ethereum contract library; not protocol law.

primarySources.name: Foundry
primarySources.boundChoice: Candidate Ethereum build/test/deploy harness; not protocol law.

primarySources.name: viem
primarySources.boundChoice: Candidate low-level Ethereum TypeScript client; not protocol law.

primarySources.name: wagmi
primarySources.boundChoice: Candidate React Ethereum wallet hook layer; not protocol law.

closedCriteria: web research agenda is complete against durable primary and official sources
normative V27 choices are rebound into a repository document
external standards remain design references unless translated into Bitcode-native law
library optionality remains adapter-level and does not create protocol dependency lock-in
